query:
UPDATE establishments SET address = REPLACE(address, 'Chacara', 'Chácara') WHERE address LIKE '%Chacara%' AND address NOT LIKE '%Chácara%';
UPDATE establishments SET address = REPLACE(address, 'Mario', 'Mário') WHERE address LIKE '%Mario%' AND address NOT LIKE '%Mário%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute UPDATE establishments SET address = REPLACE(address, 'Chacara', 'Chácara') WHERE address LIKE '%Chacara%' AND address NOT LIKE '%Chácara%';
UPDATE establishments SET address = REPLACE(address, 'Mario', 'Mário') WHERE address LIKE '%Mario%' AND address NOT LIKE '%Mário%';
